home.metaDescription: NexAIpla — smart technology solutions for businesses. Online bookings, automation, and tools that simplify your daily operations.
home.hero.title: Smart technology solutions for your business
home.hero.subtitle: NexAIpla builds apps that simplify everyday work — from online bookings to automated customer communication.
home.apps.title: Our apps
home.apps.subtitle: Choose the app that fits your needs — each solution is designed for specific business requirements.
apps.onlineBooking.title: Online Receptionist 24/7
apps.onlineBooking.description: Chat, QR code, and SMS confirmation and reminders. For appointment-based businesses — salons, clinics, medical offices, spas, gyms, repair shops, and more.
apps.shopTraffic.title: Live Business Traffic
apps.shopTraffic.description: Live view of foot traffic — shows customers how busy the shop is right now, without appointments. For barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and other walk-in businesses.
apps.foodOrder.title: Online Food Orders, Delivery & Kitchen
apps.foodOrder.description: Online takeaway & delivery orders with SMS, delivery map, and kitchen dashboard. For restaurants, grill shops, and delivery-only businesses.
foodorder.metaDescription: Online food ordering for restaurants — takeaway & delivery with SMS confirmation, Google Maps delivery zones, kitchen dashboard, and driver board. Built for Cyprus.
foodorder.hero.title: Online Food Orders, Delivery & Kitchen — with SMS confirmation
foodorder.hero.subtitle: Customers order from a bilingual menu, confirm via SMS, and track their order. Owners manage the kitchen live — no customer accounts required.
foodorder.problems.title: Problems it solves
foodorder.problems.subtitle: From phone chaos to a structured ordering flow — for customers, kitchen, and drivers.
foodorder.problems.p1.title: Phone-only orders, errors & waiting
foodorder.problems.p1.text: Structured online menu and checkout in a few steps — no hold music, no misheard items.
foodorder.problems.p2.title: Customers don't know order status
foodorder.problems.p2.text: SMS with a manage link — cancel, modify, or view history without calling back.
foodorder.problems.p3.title: Delivery zone uncertainty
foodorder.problems.p3.text: Google Maps pin and radius validation — customers know upfront if delivery is available.
foodorder.problems.p4.title: Kitchen chaos & driver coordination
foodorder.problems.p4.text: Live owner dashboard plus a separate driver board with SMS updates to customers.
foodorder.offerings.title: What it offers
foodorder.offerings.subtitle: Complete tools for every role in the ordering flow.
foodorder.offerings.o1.title: For customers
foodorder.offerings.o1.text: Bilingual menu (Greek/English), pickup or delivery, scheduled orders, cart with notes — no signup required.
foodorder.offerings.o2.title: For owners
foodorder.offerings.o2.text: Live order queue, KPIs, shop closures, emergency bulk cancel, and settings — access via secure link, no password.
foodorder.offerings.o3.title: For drivers
foodorder.offerings.o3.text: Dedicated delivery board: ready → on the way (SMS + ETA) → done. Separate signed link from the owner dashboard.
foodorder.features.title: Why choose it
foodorder.features.subtitle: Built for Cyprus restaurants — fast to deploy, easy for customers.
foodorder.features.f1.title: No customer accounts
foodorder.features.f1.text: Access via SMS links — zero friction for the customer, no passwords to remember.
foodorder.features.f2.title: Cyprus-ready
foodorder.features.f2.text: 9% VAT breakdown, 8-digit mobile numbers, Europe/Nicosia timezone, Greek and English UI.
foodorder.features.f3.title: Fast per-restaurant setup
foodorder.features.f3.text: One deployment per restaurant — full data isolation, Vercel + Postgres, ready in under an hour.
foodorder.screenshots.title: Take a look
foodorder.screenshots.subtitle: From the customer menu to the kitchen dashboard and SMS notifications.

booking.metaDescription: Online Receptionist 24/7 — chat, QR code, and SMS confirmation and reminders. For appointment-based businesses: salons, clinics, medical offices, spas, and more.
booking.hero.title: Online Receptionist 24/7 — with SMS confirmation and reminders
booking.hero.subtitle: Scan a QR code, book via chat, and manage your appointment from a link in the SMS. Ideal for any business that works with appointments.
booking.demo.title: See how it works
booking.demo.subtitle: A quick walkthrough of the booking flow — from chat to SMS confirmation and reminders.
booking.demo.noVideo: Your browser does not support video.
booking.demo.placeholderText: Replace the placeholder by adding your video to the public/landing/ folder.
booking.benefits.title: Why choose it
booking.benefits.subtitle: Fewer phone calls, more appointments — for you and your customers.
booking.benefits.b1.title: Fast booking without phone calls
booking.benefits.b1.text: Chat UI, service, staff, and time selection in a few steps — no waiting on hold.
booking.benefits.b2.title: SMS confirmation, reminders & management
booking.benefits.b2.text: Confirmation, reminders, cancellation, or rescheduling via a link you receive by SMS.
booking.benefits.b3.title: Dashboard for your business
booking.benefits.b3.text: Appointment board, KPIs, reminders, and sync with Google Calendar.

booking.screenshots.subtitle: From the customer experience to your business management tools.

app.title: Live Business Traffic
app.tagline: Live business traffic for walk-in shops — without appointments.
waitless.metaTitle: Live Business Traffic — live shop traffic status
waitless.metaDescription: Live traffic without appointments — how busy it is now, opening hours, and announcements. For barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and other walk-in businesses.
waitless.heroHeadline: Know how busy it is—before you leave.
waitless.heroLead: Shows customers how busy the business is right now — and when you are open. Ideal for barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and other walk-in businesses.
waitless.pillarCustomerBlurb: Public page with live wait levels, hours, and announcements.
waitless.pillarOwnerBlurb: Private dashboard — one tap to update traffic for walk-ins.
waitless.pillarPricingBlurb: €30 setup, €25/month, or 10% off the subscription when you pay annually.
waitless.heroSub: Without appointments — people simply see the real picture before they head out.
waitless.ownerNote: Owners use a private, secure link (not a public customer login). Open the link you were given — it is not listed on this page.
waitless.customerIntro: Each shop has a public page (for example /shop/your-shop-name). There you will find:
waitless.customer.b1: Live traffic / wait with four clear levels (colour-coded): about 0–10 min, 10–20, 20–40, 45+ minutes, with plain labels like “immediate”, “short wait”, and so on.
waitless.customer.b2: Open or closed using your real hours, special closed days, and optional emergency close — shown as “temporarily closed” when the owner turns it on.
waitless.customer.b3: Hours: today, weekly plan, and special closed days.
waitless.customer.b6: Automatic refresh about every 15–20 seconds — no WebSockets.
waitless.customer.b7: A browser notification when the wait level changes (where the browser allows it).
waitless.customer.b8: PWA: add to home screen, built mobile-first.
waitless.levelsCaption: The four wait levels in the app
waitless.ownerIntro: Private dashboard, separate from the customer page:
waitless.owner.b1: Sign-in via a secure long-lived opaque link (on the order of ~90 days) — access is defined by that link, not a shared public login.
waitless.owner.b2: One tap to update traffic: four buttons (LOW / MEDIUM / BUSY / VERY BUSY) matching the colours and wait ranges customers see.
waitless.owner.b4: Announcements plus emergency close / reopen from the same area.
waitless.owner.b5: Settings such as default shop language and idle / auto-downgrade options where they apply.
waitless.owner.b6: PWA for owners: home-screen shortcuts for quick status updates.
waitless.owner.b7: Offline: queue failed updates and retry when you are back online.
waitless.whyNot.p1: Booking answers “do I have a slot?”. Live Business Traffic answers “how busy is it right now?” — that is what walk-in clients usually care about.
waitless.whyNot.p2: It sets expectations without promising a chair at an exact minute, and it fits shops where people drop in or queues shift fast.
waitless.whyNot.p3: It complements how many walk-in businesses already work — without appointments, and does not replace bookings if you still need them.
waitless.pwa.p1: Customers and owners get a mobile-first layout. On supported phones you can install the app to the home screen like a light native app.
waitless.pwa.p2: Owners can jump in, tap a traffic level, and leave — ideal between clients.
waitless.smart.p1: Stale warning if traffic has not been updated for a while (configurable).
waitless.smart.p2: Automatic downgrade from “very busy” after a set time (production cron) so the board does not stay red forever by mistake.
waitless.pricingIntro: Per shop. Prices do not include VAT.
waitless.pricingAnnualDesc: 10% off the subscription when billed annually (vs €25 × 12). The €30 installation is separate, charged once.
waitless.contactIntro: Want to see if Live Business Traffic fits your business? Get in touch.
